node.data: {"M8076":{"lit":"սահմանեաց","context":"text/body/ab[42]","n":"սահմանեաց"},"M6616":{"lit":"սահմանեաց","context":"text/body/ab[23]","n":"սահմանեաց"},"M3237":{"lit":"սահմանեաց","line":{"facs":"#z104359354","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104359354","n":"8"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"3237-090a"},"n":"սահմանեաց"},"M7085":{"lit":"սահմանեաց","line":{"facs":"#z104150191","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104150191","n":"12"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"7085-001a"},"n":"սահմանեաց"},"M8699":{"lit":"սահման<lb xml:id=\"l103943467\" facs=\"#z103943467\" n=\"15\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>եաց","line":{"facs":"#z103943466","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103943466","n":"14"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8699-082b"},"n":"սահմանեաց"},"M6686":{"lit":"սահմանեաց","line":{"facs":"#z103975000","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103975000","n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"6686.0415"},"n":"սահմանեաց"},"M4287":{"lit":"սահ<lb xml:id=\"l103973089\" facs=\"#z103973089\" n=\"6\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>մանեաց","line":{"facs":"#z103973088","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103973088","n":"5"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"4287.0272b"},"n":"սահմանեաց"}}
